case_title: MOLINA, ELBA VS PEREZ, LETICIA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,300.00 FILED BY MOLINA, ELBA AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, LETICIA PEREZ-ARANA, GAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-11-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOLINA, ELBA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, LETICIA PEREZ-ARANA, GAIL PLTF'S REP'S NOTICE FOR CONTINUANCE DENIED. PLTF'S NOT APPEAR AND DEFT' NOT AGREE TO CONTINUANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
